props.name: ariaRemoveLabel
props.description: Provides an accessible label for the remove button of every chip rendered by the React Chip Set component.

props.name: as
props.description: Specifies the root element or custom component used by the React Chip Set component.

props.name: chips
props.description: Renders chips from data instead of children. Each item is a string or an object with a `value`, an optional `label`, and any `CChip` props. Children are used when this is omitted.

props.name: className
props.description: Adds custom classes to the React Chip Set root element.

props.name: defaultChips
props.description: Sets the initial uncontrolled chips. In this mode the React Chip Set component owns the list and removes chips itself; use `chips` (with `onRemove`) for a controlled list.

props.name: defaultSelected
props.description: Sets the initial uncontrolled selection of the React Chip Set component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables every chip rendered by the React Chip Set component.

props.name: filter
props.description: Turns the chips into filter chips, each showing a leading check icon while selected.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Callback fired when a chip requests removal. The chips are controlled by their rendered children, so remove the chip from your data in response.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the selected chip values of the React Chip Set component change.

props.name: removable
props.description: Displays a remove button on every chip rendered by the React Chip Set component.

props.name: removeIcon
props.description: Replaces the default remove icon on every chip with a custom icon node.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Enables selection behavior for the chips rendered by the React Chip Set component.

props.name: selected
props.description: Controls the selected chip values of the React Chip Set component.

props.name: selectedIcon
props.description: Replaces the default selected icon shown by filter chips with a custom icon node.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Sets how many chips can be selected at once in the React Chip Set component.
